CustomField.description: Format string for the masking token. Use {index} as placeholder for the unique token number. Example: [SSN:{index}] produces [SSN:001], [SSN:002], etc.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Token format used to replace detected PII. {index} is replaced with a zero-padded counter. Examples: [SSN:{index}], [CARD:{index}], [EMAIL:{index}]. Keep it distinct so it can be unmasked later.
CustomField.label: Mask Format
